transcript: AI: What happened? Human: I am very sentiment. AI: I am very sentimental bolna chahiye, ya fir I am an emotional person bolo. [You should say 'I am very sentimental', or say 'I am an emotional person'.] Human: Oh, aise hai kya? Kaise seekhu English? [Oh, is that so? How do I learn English?] AI: Mere saath roz sirf 15 minute daily practice karo, ek mahine mein hi English seekh jaoge. [Just practice with me for 15 minutes daily, you will learn English in just one month.] Human: Yeh sab toh mehenga hoga na? [This must be expensive, right?] AI: Bas ek rupaye mein is app ko pura try kar sakte ho. Ek crore se zyada log mere saath English seekh rahe hain. [You can try this app fully for just one rupee. More than 1 crore people are learning English with me.] Human: Wow, kaise join karu? [Wow, how do I join?] AI: Abhi turant MySivi app download karo aur English seekhna shuru karo. [Download the MySivi app right now and start learning English.]
on_screen_text: WHAT HAPPENED? I AM VERY SENTIMENT. I AM VERY SENTIMENTAL. I AM AN EMOTIONAL PERSON. OH, AISE HAI KYA? KAISE SEEKHU ENGLISH? MERE SAATH ROZ SIRF 15 MINUTE DAILY PRACTICE EK MAHINE MEIN HI ENGLISH SEEKH JAOGE. YEH SAB TO MEHENGA HO GA NA? MySivi Premium LIMITED TIME OFFER 3 days of Premium benefits for ₹1. BAS EK RUPEYE MEIN TRY KAR SAKTE HO. MySivi AI Speak English 10M+ Downloads. EK CRORE SE ZYADA ENGLISH SEEKH RAHE HAIN. KAISE JOIN KARU? ABHI TURANT MYSIVI APP DOWNLOAD KARO ENGLISH SEEKHNA SHURU KARO.
summary: An AI avatar corrects a crying woman's English grammar in a split-screen format. The AI promotes the MySivi app, offering a 3-day premium trial for just 1 rupee to practice daily. The ad ends with a call to download the app and start learning.
